# GetSmoke

> GetSmoke (getsmoke.com) is a US-based online vape and disposable e-cigarette retailer operated by Cosmoproject LLC in Florida. We sell disposable vapes, pod systems, hookah products, and e-liquids from top brands. Adults 21+ only. All products contain nicotine, an addictive chemical. We ship across the US (excluding states where online vape sales are prohibited).

## Shop by Category

- [Disposable Vapes](https://getsmoke.com/vapes): Browse 700+ disposable vape products
- [Switch Pods / Pod Systems](https://getsmoke.com/pods): Pod kits and replacement pods
- [Hookah Products](https://getsmoke.com/hookah): Al Fakher, Starbuzz, and other hookah tobacco
- [Vape Juice / E-Liquids](https://getsmoke.com/vape-juice): Salt nic and freebase e-liquids
- [Bundle Deals](https://getsmoke.com/bundles): Multi-pack discounts and combo deals
- [All Brands](https://getsmoke.com/brands): Full brand directory

## Top Brand Pages

- [Geek Bar](https://getsmoke.com/brands/geek-bar): Pulse, Pulse X, Meloso, Lush, Skyview series
- [HQD](https://getsmoke.com/brands/hqd): Cuvie Bar, Cuvie Glaze, Cuvie Slick, Everest, Mars
- [Lost Mary](https://getsmoke.com/brands/lost-mary): MT15000, Turbo 35000, Ultrasonic, Nera kits
- [RAZ](https://getsmoke.com/brands/raz): DC25000, TN9000, DC25000 Zero Nicotine Free
- [FUME](https://getsmoke.com/brands/fume): Extra, Pro, Infinity, Eternity, Hookah
- [Juicy Bar](https://getsmoke.com/brands/juicy-bar): JB5000, JB7500 PRO, JB25000 PRO MAX
- [Fifty Bar](https://getsmoke.com/brands/fifty-bar): Original, Fruitia, White Series, Black Series
- [Flum](https://getsmoke.com/brands/flum): Pebble, Float, and other Flum disposables
- [Foger](https://getsmoke.com/brands/foger): Switch Pro Kit, Bit 35K, replacement pods
- [VIHO](https://getsmoke.com/brands/viho): TRX, Supercharge, Turbo series
- [Oxbar](https://getsmoke.com/brands/oxbar): Astro Maze and other Oxbar products
- [EBCreate / EBdesign](https://getsmoke.com/brands/ebcreate): BC5000, BC Pro 40K

- [Geek Bar Pulse X 25000 Puffs](https://getsmoke.com/models/geek-bar-pulse-x-25000-puffs): All flavors, specs, pricing
- [Geek Bar Pulse 15000 Puffs](https://getsmoke.com/models/geek-bar-pulse-15000-puffs): All flavors, specs, pricing

- [HQD Cuvie Glaze 12000 Puffs](https://getsmoke.com/models/hqd-cuvie-glaze-12000-puffs): All flavors
- [Lost Mary MT15000 Puffs](https://getsmoke.com/models/lost-mary-mt15000-15000-puffs): Turbo mode, all flavors
- [Lost Mary Turbo 35000 Puffs](https://getsmoke.com/models/lost-mary-turbo-35000-puffs): All flavors
- [RAZ DC25000 25000 Puffs](https://getsmoke.com/models/raz-dc25000-25000-puffs): All flavors
- [RAZ TN9000 9000 Puffs](https://getsmoke.com/models/raz-tn9000-9000-puffs): All flavors

## Company and Legal

- [About Us](https://getsmoke.com/about-us): Who we are, our mission
- [Contact](https://getsmoke.com/contact): Customer support - info@getsmoke.com
- [Shipping Policy](https://getsmoke.com/shipping-policy): PACT Act compliance, delivery times, restricted states
- [Return Policy](https://getsmoke.com/return-policy): Refund and return terms
- [Terms and Conditions](https://getsmoke.com/terms-and-conditions): Legal terms of sale
- [Privacy Policy](https://getsmoke.com/privacy-policy): Data handling and CCPA compliance
- [Age Verification](https://getsmoke.com/age-verification): 21+ policy, how we verify age

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- Company legal name: Cosmoproject LLC
- Brand name: GetSmoke
- Location: Florida, USA
- Ships to: US only (48 contiguous states, restrictions apply in CA, NY, MA and others)
- Minimum age: 21+
- Products: Disposable vapes (700+), pod systems (100+), hookah tobacco (78+), e-liquids (16+)
- Nicotine content: Typically 5% (50mg) salt nicotine
- Puff counts: Range from 1,200 to 70,000 puffs depending on model
- Price range: $14.99 - $29.99 for most disposables
- Free shipping: On orders over $89
- PACT Act compliant: Yes, adult signature required on delivery
- Payment: Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover
- Contact: info@getsmoke.com
